title: Listening - Part 2
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer (A, B or C).

questions.context: A conversation about choosing a holiday destination.
questions.question: What does the woman suggest?
questions.audio_script:
Woman: Are you still interested in choosing a holiday destination this weekend?

Man: Yes, definitely. I checked the information online yesterday, but I realised we may need to change our original plans slightly.

Woman: Really? I thought everything was already organised.

Man: Most of it is, but I discovered that tickets are selling faster than expected. I think it would be better if we booked online tonight instead of waiting until Saturday.

Woman: That sounds sensible. It would be disappointing if there were no places left when we arrived.

Man: Exactly. Also, if we book now, we can choose better times and avoid long queues.

Woman: Good idea. I’ll do it this evening.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you still interested in this weekend plans?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but I think we should book online tonight.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C because the conversation clearly supports this idea.
